name: Release Notes v3.15.3 - POS and Back Office
body: [{"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Release Notes v3.15.3 - POS and Back Office"}], "data-id": "release-notes-v3-15-3-pos-and-back-office"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "These updates will become available to all customers by the "}, {"text": "30th March 2022.", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Video Overview"}], "data-id": "video-overview"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "iframe", "url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/690355967?h=b835b6a65f", "frameAttributes": {"width": "640", "height": "346"}, "embedData": {"url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/690355967?h=b835b6a65f", "embedType": "iframe", "name": "", "width": "640", "height": "346"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "New Features"}], "data-id": "new-features"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Invoice Pick List"}], "data-id": "invoice-pick-list"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppdi6EAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppdi6EAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 - 2023-07-09T190322.862.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fress.zendesk.com%2Fhc%2Farticle_attachments%2F4538349638031%2Fmceclip0.png", "children": [{"text": "Click to view full size"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Streamline your fulfilment processes with the new Invoice Pick List! If your Fulfilment Team use a picking process by customer order, the new Invoice Pick List will provide all the information they need to easily locate and dispatch the stock quickly and efficiently."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Invoice Pick List contains key information, including:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Product information, Bin Locations and Product Attributes"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Stock availability information e.g. Available to Pick, or Reference for Inbound Stock"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Customer Details"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Freight Information"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "and more"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If printing a large number of invoices for picking at once, the new Batch Generation feature will also split the batch into multiple files for printing."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Invoice-Pick-List", "children": [{"text": "Find out more..."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Shopify Pre-Orders"}], "data-id": "shopify-pre-orders"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppfgOEAQ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppfgOEAQ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Pre-Orders.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using the new "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Understanding-Shopify-Pre-Orders", "children": [{"text": "Shopify Pre-Orders integration"}]}, {"text": " you can now sell products online before they arrive in stock, generating cash flow while reducing inventory risk."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Features of Pre-Orders:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Independent configuration for each Shopify Store connected to Retail Express"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Manage which products are available for Pre-Order"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Provides workflows for preselling only what you've ordered vs only ordering what has been presold"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Display ETA Dates to customers, so they understand when Purchase Orders are expected to arrive"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To improve your customer experience online we recommend using "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fapps.shopify.com%2Fpreorder-now", "children": [{"text": "Pre-Order Now"}]}, {"text": ", available in the Shopify App Store "}, {"text": "e.g. display a \"Pre-Order\" button instead of \"Add to Cart\" (alternatively you can custom develop your own solution)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Understanding-Shopify-Pre-Orders", "children": [{"text": "Read more..."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Shopify Inventory Buffers"}], "data-id": "shopify-inventory-buffers"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppfgTEAQ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppfgTEAQ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Inventory Buffers.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Reduce your risk of overselling due to stock discrepancies with Shopify Inventory Buffers!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using Inventory Buffers you can specify a quantity level (buffer) of products to be excluded from the stock available to sell online."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Buffers can be set:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Per Shopify Store (meaning if you have multiple stores connected you can control different buffers to suit each store)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Globally (as a default for all products) or as a custom buffer set per Product Type"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Shopify-Inventory-Buffers", "children": [{"text": "Read more..."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "New Endpoints for the REST API"}], "data-id": "new-endpoints-for-the-rest-api"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following new endpoints will be added to the REST API:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Endpoint", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Details", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "GET /productbarcodes"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Gets all the additional Product Barcodes"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Can be searched based on the Product ID or Barcode, or return all barcodes in the system."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "GET /producteta"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Get all Product estimated times of arrival."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Requires either the Product ID or SKU, a quantity ordered, and either a Fulfilment Outlet ID or Sales Channel ID."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "POST /products"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Creates Products"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "DELETE /products/{id}"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Disables specific product by ID"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Hides the product from reports and Stocktake by default"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Turns off communication between Retail Express and ecommerce/Web Store integrations"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Excludes from Product Search in POS"}]}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "PUT /products/{id}"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Updates Product by ID"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "GET?/shipmenttypes"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Searches Shipment Type by parameters"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "POST?/shipmenttypes"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Creates Shipment Type"}]}]}]}, {"type": [{"text": "Updates Shipment Type"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "DELETE?/shipmenttypes?/{id}"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Deletes Shipment Type by ID"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "GET /shippingports"}]}]}, ID"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-45969b87"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Additional changes:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "new order_by parameter added to GET /products which allows results to be ordered by id, supplier_sku, supplier_sku2, manufacturer_sku, short_description, product_type, supplier, size, colour, core_product, disabled"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "new filter_by parameter added to GET /supplierreturns which allows results to be filtered by supplier, outlet, supplier_return_status, return_authorisation, created_on, started_on, finalised_on, modified_on. Various operators are available and filters can be combined - please see documentation for more details"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please note the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fdeveloper.retailexpress.com.au%2F", "children": [{"text": "Developer Portal"}]}, {"text": " information will be available after 30th March (when the roll out to all customers has been complete)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Improvements and Resolutions"}], "data-id": "improvements-and-resolutions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Improvements"}], "data-id": "improvements"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Customer's Loyalty History Tab in Back Office is now sorted in chronological order of when the transaction was created."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Removed the \"Install Drivers\" link from the Back Office Help Menu as these drivers are no longer required following the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/IMPORTANT-Label-Printing-Changes", "children": [{"text": "update to Label Printing"}]}, {"text": " to use JS Print (if you need to install the Barcode font you can access it "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Installing-Barcode-Font-and-Drivers", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": ")."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Updated the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Global-Settings", "children": [{"text": "Global Settings"}]}, {"text": " to remove the Purchase Order and Label Print settings (these features are redundant and no longer used)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Updated "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Create-a-Zebra-Label-Preset-template", "children": [{"text": "Zebra Label Printing Templates"}]}, {"text": " so you can now test print a new label before the template has been saved"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Resolutions"}], "data-id": "resolutions"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Resolved an issue where under some instances the wrong Purchase Order number was displayed against a transaction on the Fulfilment Report"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Resolved an issue with the Shopify Connector where specific countries weren't synchronised"}]}]}]}]
